texts.title: Instructions of Shuruppak — opening formula (Post 2)
texts.source: The Instructions of Shuruppak, ETCSL corpus text 5.6.1, line 1; https://etcsl.orinst.ox.ac.uk/
texts.translation: In those days, in those distant days…
texts.pronunciation_confidence: moderate — vowels not written; scholarly convention

line_ipa_derivation.method: reconstructed from Wikipedia Sumerian phonology in latest_scrape.json; ETCSL transliteration attested

texts.notes: DAVID Post 2 hook line. Transliteration attested on cuneiform tablets; spoken vowels reconstructed.
